revive_ready.title: Confirm your Revive Crystal is crafted and ready

scroll_found.title: Research the Return Dominion scroll at a Research Pedestal

subtitle.text: You are the thirteenth civilization. Act accordingly.

description: You have returned from the End.
You have reconnected with the community you built.
You have explored the Lost Void.
You have crafted the symbol of return.
You have begun the first piece of Ch16 master crafting.
The Return Dominion scroll marks the formalization of your civilization.
It is found in End City reward chests and deep True End structures.
Research it. It is the declaration that the thirteenth civilization has survived
The Lost Void age opens Ch16.
Ch16 is the long road home — Celestisynth mastery,
the highest tier crafting, and the return to community at scale.
